title: etlingera metriocheilos
intro: Etlingera metriocheilos, also known as Bunga Kantan, is a species of flowering plant in the ginger family (Zingiberaceae) native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Etlingera metriocheilos include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome is typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, or it is processed into capsules or tinctures for convenient consumption.
